doc.launch: The exact source-built macOS application launches one N64 ROM in kiosk fullscreen with its Semu-owned settings file. There is no host application, prebuilt binary, or libretro fallback.
doc.state: The command line resolves every mutable ares path below the per-emulator state root. Generated settings are installed into that root; ROM, package, project, and external emulation trees remain read-only under sandbox-exec.
doc.input: ares SDL input consumes the complete Steam Virtual Gamepad mapping emitted from profile.json, with a stable Quartz keyboard fallback for macOS verification. The declared hotkeys cover pause, screenshot, fullscreen, state slots, save/load, fast-forward, and quit; the emulator source contains no Semu-specific Start+Select policy.
doc.rendering: The launch contract forces ares' OpenGL 3.2 driver and disables its native shader. OpenGL::output calls the directly linked Semu game phase after rendering the game texture, and VideoCGL calls the post-UI phase immediately before flushBuffer; ares owns no Semu shader, bezel, or menu behavior.
